test_cases.name: simple_naf_rule
test_cases.description: Rule with NAF in body: B :- A, not C
test_cases.naf_semantics: C is assumed false unless proven true

test_cases.name: naf_with_conflict
test_cases.description: NAF conflict: A :- not B, B
test_cases.naf_semantics: A cannot be true since B is true

test_cases.name: stable_model_consistency
test_cases.description: Stable model is consistent with all rules
